title: Mina (handmaiden)
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
'''Mina''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as one of the [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaidens]], with [[Alana]], of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She remained at the [[Chatos Academy|Academy of Chatos]] at [[Yuell]], after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] invaded the [[Aquilaean system]], impersonating her mistress.

Mina physically resembled Leia and had long dark hair.

==Behind the scenes==
The idea of having a [[Sabé|handmaiden stand-in]] for a royalty was eventually used in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Episode I]].
